findings.detail: artifacts/reference_store/Homo sapiens/GRCh38/refs/raw/reference.fa.gz is an ASCII synthetic placeholder payload rather than a real compressed reference, so corpus-01 deplete_host cannot publish against that lineage.

the available Lunarc cache lineage bijux-reference/taxonomy/minimal_screen_v1 is a PhiX174/UniVec smoke-test database, so corpus-01 screen_taxonomy cannot publish against it as a full taxonomy benchmark.
